title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: Claude Code source code was exposed via an accidentally committed NPM map file. The video discusses how Claude Code functions as a TypeScript harness wrapping an LLM, describes its 3-layer memory system, analyzes copyright and DMCA implications for AI-generated code, examines token subsidization economics, and explores telemetry practices including Datadog integration.
